import pandas as pd


def clean_data(df):
    df.drop_duplicates()
    df.sort_values("name")
    df.reset_index(drop=True)
    return df


def transform_prices(df):
    df.fillna(0)
    df.drop(columns=["temp_col"])
    return df


def process_orders(df):
    df.groupby("customer_id").sum()
    df.merge(pd.DataFrame({"id": [1]}), on="id")
    return df
